div.p: Sender cannot exceed either constraint. Network congestion OR buffer overflow will result.

p.strong: How the window slides through sequence space:

ul.li: SND.UNA = Oldest unacknowledged byte (window left edge)
SND.NXT = Next byte to send (in-flight right edge)

div.p: Network-imposed limit Based on estimated network capacity
Grows via slow start and congestion avoidance. Reduces on packet loss (congestion signal).
Receiver buffer limit Advertised in every ACK segment
Receiver's available buffer space. Prevents sender from overwhelming receiver.
These bytes are already on the wire, consuming window space.
